content:
but Traphase queue times are good?
Well, considering how small the game is. Its like 1 min on avg.
溢出的碎片10换1能不能改回之前的要养成碎片啊QWQ
把代理憑證取消在幹嘛啊???這樣不對啊!!!!拜託有些人因為沒時間所以需要用代理憑證啊!!!!!傻眼ㄟ<:shock:1356053145427640483>
我知道,但還是會希望代理憑證能留著QQ
new rewards to help new players. and new players get shit with new rewards becouse locked to top 10% 😄
1 minute on average? Damn you're lucky
Most of the time I'm spending like 3 minutes on queue. Sometimes I spend more than 6 minutes

守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于<t:1776692400:f>进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年5月4日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、任务与奖励
【弥萨格商店】
● 命轮购买：现在仅可在「兑换商店」中购买尚未溢出的命轮，此项改动在V2.5.0.0更新后已生效。
 
二、问题修复
【活动】
● 修复了活动「聚灵演练」中，阿拉克涅试玩活动名称错误，修复后为「永恒之网」。
 
【故事】
● 调查行动
    ○ 修复了「星辰篇」第二章、第五章中的个别文本错误。 
    ○ 修复了敌人「缚命人」的描述中的文本错误。 
● 通讯器
    ○ 修复了对话中「温柯尔」名字和「戈利亚」选项文本错误的问题。 
● 异梦视界
    ○ 修复了英语语言设置下，异梦视界「再见永无乡」中部分文本的拼写错误问题。
 
【战斗】
● 关卡
    ○ 修复了「星辰篇」关卡篇章的效果说明中，发动超维回合后重置「算力调和」效果的说明遗漏。
    ○ 修复了「星辰篇」造物「维度影像 · 莱克」的描述中，每回合首次骰子点数总是为 6 描述错误，应为最大值。
    ○ 修复了「星辰篇」造物「维度影像 · 阿拉克涅」的描述中，缺失了回合开始时获得 15 点狂气的问题。
    ○ 修复了活动「织者自缚」中，造物「命运纺纶」造成的状态名称错误。
● 唤醒体   
    ○ 修复了未携带唤醒体「阿拉克涅」出战时，「命运裁断」未能被正确触发的问题。
    ○ 修复了部分敌人触发死亡抵抗后，若恢复后的剩余生命低于「命运裁断」层数，「命运裁断」未能击杀目标的问题。
    ○ 修复了部分敌人触发「命运裁断」死亡时，若触发了复活相关效果，「命运裁断」可能会错误地再次对目标造成伤害的问题。
    ○ 修复了在探索中查看「牌堆」时，唤醒体「24」的卡牌描述中人格效果的数值错误地显示为 0 的问题。
    ○ 修复了日语语言设置下，唤醒体「阿拉克涅」的卡牌描述中部分参数显示不正确的问题。
    ○ 修复了英语语言设置下，部分唤醒体的卡牌描述中存在词缀文本显示不正确的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「波吕克斯」、「杜勒赛因」激活「最终法则」时，若本场战斗中释放过「灵知觉醒」，后续所有战斗中即使没有释放也能够享受「最终法则」效果加成的问题。
 
【任务与奖励】
● 密境课室
    ○ 修复了「资源勘探」中，点击玩法查看详情会卡住的问题。
    ○ 修复了「资源勘探」中，「幕间演习」的剩余资源预览错误地计入了「无光之境」已获得奖励的问题。
    ○ 修复了「密境课室」红点会在重新登录后不显示的问题。
● 弥萨格商店
    ○ 修复了「沉淀兑换」中，在「灵魂回溯碎片」数量足够的情况下，兑换「灵魂回溯之芯」可能会提示「物品数量不足」无法兑换的问题。
 
【界面与功能】
● 大厅
    ○ 修复了「守密纪行」入口图标不够清晰的问题。    
● 唤醒
    ○ 修复了在某些语言设置下，「晦夜引灯」唤醒的「选择唤醒体」界面文本会错误地显示为简体中文的问题。
● 唤醒体
    ○ 修复了在某些语言设置下，「升格预览」中需要蔷薇金券的文本会错误地显示为中文的问题。
● 幻梦深潜
    ○ 修复了「排行奖励」中，可能会出现「调查头衔」名字底部的标签未完整显示的问题。

**V2.5.0.1 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on <t:1776692400:f> . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
   
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
   
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on May 4, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
   
[Update content]
1. Tasks and Rewards
[Mythag Shop]
● Wheel of Destiny Purchase: You can now only purchase Wheels of Destiny that have not yet overflowed in the "Exchange Store." This change has taken effect after the V2.5.0.0 update.
 
2. Bug Fixes
[Event]
● Fixed an issue in the "Team Trial" event where the Arachne trial event name was incorrect. The name has been corrected to "Tela Perpetua."
 
[Story]
● Investigation
    ○ Fixed some text errors in Chapter 2 and Chapter 5 of "Astral Reign" 
    ○ Fixed a text error in the description of the enemy "Fatebound" 
● Communicator
    ○ Fixed an issue with incorrect name text for "Winkle" and option text for "Goliath" in dialogue 
● Dreamscape
    ○ Fixed a spelling error in certain text within the Dreamscape "See You in Neverland" under English language settings.
 
[Combat]
● Stage
    ○ Fixed a missing description in the Effect notes of "Astral Reign" Stage chapters, where resetting the "Arithmetica Harmony" Effect after triggering an Ultra Round was not mentioned.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the description of the Astral Reign Relic "Dimensional Image · Ryker" incorrectly stated that the first dice roll total each round is always 6; it should read "maximum value."
    ○ Fixed an issue where the description of the Astral Reign Relic "Dimensional Image·Arachne" was missing the effect of gaining 15 Aliemus at the start of the turn.
    ○ Fixed an issue in the event "Bound Weaver" where the Relic "Fate Spindle" caused incorrect State names.
● Awakener   
    ○ Fixed an issue where "Final Verdict" was not triggered correctly when the Awakener "Arachne" was not brought into battle.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, after certain enemies triggered Death Resistance, if the HP Left after recovery was lower than the stacks of "Final Verdict", "Final Verdict" failed to Kill the target.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, if a revival-related Effect was triggered upon an enemy's death caused by "Final Verdict", "Final Verdict" might incorrectly deal DMG to the target again.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the numerical values of Persona Effects in the Card description of Awakener "24" were incorrectly displayed as 0 when viewing the "Deck" during Exploration.
    ○ Fixed an issue where some parameters were displayed incorrectly in the Card description of Awakener "Arachne" under Japanese language settings.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, under English language settings, the Affix text in the Card descriptions of some Awakeners was displaying incorrectly.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, if "Rouse" had been unleashed during the current battle, Awakeners "Pollux" and "Doresain" could benefit from the "Absolute Axiom" Effect bonus in all subsequent battles even without unleashing it.

[Mission & Rewards]
● Handbook
    ○ Fixed an issue in "Silver Survey" where clicking on a gameplay to view details would cause a freeze.
    ○ Fixed an issue in "Silver Survey" where the remaining resource preview in "Interludes" incorrectly counted rewards already obtained in "Lightless Realm".
    ○ Fixed an issue where the "Handbook" red dot would not appear after logging back in.
● Mythag Shop
    ○ Fixed an issue in "Sediment Exchange" where, when the quantity of "Soul Rewind Shards" was sufficient, exchanging for a "Soul Rewind Core" might prompt "Insufficient item quantity" and prevent the exchange.
 
[Interface & Features]
● Lobby
    ○ Fixed an issue where the "Archives" entry icon was not clear enough    
● Awaken
    ○ Fixed an issue where the "Choose Awakener" interface text triggered by "Moonless Guide" would incorrectly display in Simplified Chinese under certain language settings.
● Awakener
    ○ Fixed an issue where, under certain language settings, the text requiring Rose Scrip in the "Promotion Preview" would incorrectly display in Chinese.
● Phantasmal Dive
    ○ Fixed an issue in "Ranking Rewards" where the tag at the bottom of the "Survey Title" name might not be fully displayed.
Were emotes rewards from traphase removed?..
Seems so, from what I can tell...?
回溯道具又出bug了，校猫老实说是不是偷偷拿去给自己老母回溯了？
